core_objective.text: BUILD A MINIMAL RESEARCH-ONLY EQUITY STRATEGY PIPELINE: ingest OHLCV using the same FMP/PostgreSQL contract as vault_equity (1).ipynb, engineer RSI and MACD features, fit a simple linear regression signal (no live trading), backtest with walk-forward validation, and emit a verified PNL report. Goal is pipeline correctness, not profit.

master_plan.title: Vault-equity data loader with CSV/DB fallback
master_plan.intent: Create data_loader.py that mirrors vault_equity notebook settings (FMP stable API, equity_bars table, 5min interval). Load AAPL sample bars into a pandas DataFrame. If PostgreSQL is unreachable, fall back to sample_data/aapl_5min_sample.csv beside the module. Expose load_bars(symbol, interval) -> DataFrame with columns ts_utc, open, high, low, close, volume.

master_plan.title: RSI/MACD features and linear regression signal
master_plan.intent: Create signal_model.py: compute RSI(14) and MACD(12,26,9) from close prices, build feature matrix [rsi, macd, macd_signal, macd_hist], fit sklearn LinearRegression to predict next-bar return sign (classification via threshold). Expose train_model(df) -> model dict and predict_signals(df) -> DataFrame with signal column in {-1,0,1}. No external APIs.

master_plan.title: Backtest verification and PNL report
master_plan.intent: Create backtest_pnl.py: walk-forward backtest using signal_model outputs, compute cumulative PNL, max drawdown, hit rate, Sharpe (annualized). Write reports/pnl_report.json and reports/pnl_report.md. Include verify() that asserts finite PNL, non-empty trade log, and passes pytest in tests/test_backtest_pnl.py.
